sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SAFE BULKERS (NYSE: SB) director files Form 3 ownership statement
feed.summary: Vasilis Hajioannou, a director at SAFE BULKERS, INC. (NYSE: SB), has filed a Form 3, which is an initial statement of beneficial ownership. This filing indicates he is a director and reporting person for the company but does not disclose any current buy, sell, or derivative transactions. The Form 3 serves to formally register his status as an insider with the SEC, setting a baseline for future disclosures of his trading activity.

feed.title: RCM Technologies Inc (RCMT) CFO Kevin Miller Sells 4,415 Shares
feed.summary: RCM Technologies Inc.'s CFO, Kevin Miller, sold 4,415 shares of the company on April 24, 2026, bringing his total holdings to 443,800 shares. This transaction is part of a trend of insider selling at RCMT, with no insider buys and 13 insider sells over the past year. The stock is currently deemed modestly overvalued based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Altria Stock Faces a Crucial Earnings Test as Marlboro Maker’s Smoke-Free Bet Nears Judgment Day
feed.summary: Altria Group Inc. (NYSE: MO) is heading into its first-quarter earnings report on April 30, with investors keenly watching its performance amidst declining U.S. cigarette volumes. The company's focus on its smoke-free nicotine pouch "on! PLUS" is critical, especially with a leadership change scheduled for May 14 as CFO Sal Mancuso takes over as CEO. Analysts expect Q1 earnings of $1.25 per share and revenue around $4.58 billion, with the company forecasting adjusted diluted EPS growth for 2026 driven by later-year trends and tax benefits.

feed.title: Cisco Systems’ Quantum Switch Push Puts Networking Giant in Race for the Next Internet
feed.summary: Cisco Systems has unveiled a prototype quantum switch, the Cisco Universal Quantum Switch, aiming to connect various types of quantum computers and sensors using existing telecom fiber at room temperature. This move positions Cisco as a key player in developing interoperability for future quantum networks, rather than a direct competitor in quantum computer manufacturing against giants like Google and IBM. While the device is still a prototype and widespread quantum networks are years away, Cisco sees potential for earlier security applications by leveraging quantum entanglement to detect network eavesdropping.

feed.title: Iridium Communications (IRDM) Is Down 6.9% After Reaffirming 2026 Outlook Despite Profit Squeeze
feed.summary: Iridium Communications (IRDM) saw its stock drop by 6.9% after reporting mixed first-quarter 2026 results. While revenue increased, net income and earnings per share declined. Despite this, management reaffirmed its full-year 2026 service revenue growth outlook of flat to 2%, acknowledging profit pressures from compensation structure changes and softer margins. The company's investment narrative focuses on its niche in global satellite connectivity to offset these pressures and modest top-line growth.

feed.title: More than 200,000 '32 Degrees' heated socks from Costco recalled after reports of burn injuries
feed.summary: Over 200,000 pairs of "32 Degrees" heated socks sold at Costco have been recalled due to the risk of burn injuries. The U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission stated that heat, friction, moisture, and pressure can cause injuries, with more than a dozen incidents reported, including first and second-degree burns. Consumers are advised to stop wearing the socks, which were sold between August 2025 and March 2026, and return them for a full refund.

feed.title: BlackRock holds 8.2% of Century Co (NYSE: CENX) in amended 13G/A
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, disclosing a passive 8.2% stake in Century Co (NYSE: CENX). The filing indicates that BlackRock beneficially owns 8,136,119 shares of common stock, with sole voting power over 8,044,315 shares and sole dispositive power over all 8,136,119 shares. This amendment, signed on April 24, 2026, details institutional ownership and clarifies reporting units in accordance with SEC regulations.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] VICOR CORP Amended Passive Investment Disclosure
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, disclosing beneficial ownership of 2,658,780 shares of Vicor Corporation common stock, which represents 7.9% of the class. The filing specifies BlackRock holds sole voting power over 2,600,118 shares and sole dispositive power over all 2,658,780 shares. This disclosure indicates a passive investment approach, with no stated intent to influence company control.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] Alignment Healthcare, Inc. Amended Passive Investment Disclosure
feed.summary: This SEC filing (Schedule 13G/A) indicates BlackRock, Inc. reports beneficial ownership of 13,596,565 shares (6.7%) of Alignment Healthcare, Inc. common stock as of March 31, 2026. BlackRock holds sole voting power for 13,305,682 shares. The disclosure emphasizes that the holdings are attributed to specific BlackRock business units, clarifying voting and dispositive authority.

feed.title: BlackRock reports 11.4% stake in StoneCo Ltd. (NASDAQ: STNE) via Schedule 13G/A
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amendment to a Schedule 13G/A, reporting a beneficial ownership of 26,458,837 shares of StoneCo Ltd. Class A stock, which constitutes 11.4% of the class. The filing indicates BlackRock has sole voting power over 25,616,964 shares and sole dispositive power over all 26,458,837 shares. This stake is held on behalf of various clients, with no single external person holding more than 5%.

feed.title: Joby Aviation, Inc. Trade Ideas — SWB:8TQ
feed.summary: This article compiles several trade ideas and analyses for Joby Aviation, Inc. (SWB:8TQ, NYSE:JOBY), highlighting its potential as a long-term investment due to its pioneering role in commercial eVTOL aircraft. Authors discuss its operational advantages over competitors, unique rideshare business model, partnerships with Uber and Delta, Toyota's investment, and military contracts. Despite some mixed financial and technical indicators, the overall sentiment points to significant future growth fueled by upcoming catalysts.

feed.title: Expanding Direct-To-Patient Options, BMS/Pfizer Add Eliquis To Cost Plus Drugs Portal
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb and Pfizer have added their anticoagulant drug Eliquis to the Cost Plus Drugs portal, expanding direct-to-patient options for cash-paying customers. This move follows an earlier decision by the companies to sell discounted Eliquis directly. The article highlights a growing trend among drugmakers to offer lower prices for medicines outside traditional channels.

feed.title: Intuit Stock Rebounds After AI Selloff as TurboTax Owner Nears Earnings Test
feed.summary: Intuit (NASDAQ:INTU) stock rebounded 3.3% on Friday after an AI-fueled software selloff, as the company approaches its fiscal third-quarter earnings report, which covers the crucial U.S. tax-filing season. Analysts project strong earnings growth, but investors remain concerned about how AI will impact legacy software pricing and the company's ability to maintain its market position against emerging AI tools. Intuit's upcoming results will be closely watched to see if its popular products like TurboTax and QuickBooks can continue steady demand amid these industry shifts.

feed.title: Assessing Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) Valuation After Its Recent Share Price Momentum
feed.summary: Public Storage (PSA) has seen significant share price momentum recently, with a 15% return in the last month and nearly 9% over three months. While shares are trading close to the average analyst target, some models suggest the stock is undervalued by about 33%. The most popular narrative pegs fair value at $313, citing digital tool adoption and operational efficiencies, but also cautions about potential oversupply and rising costs.

feed.title: Will Softer Q1 2026 Expectations and Leasing Caution Change Alexandria Real Estate Equities' (ARE) Narrative?
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) faces conservative Q1 2026 expectations, with anticipated year-over-year declines in EPS and revenue. Analysts have slightly lowered earnings estimates, reflecting caution around short-term performance and leasing activity. Despite these pressures, the company's long-term appeal for specialized life science campuses remains, with recent strategic moves like tendering long-dated notes aiming to bolster its balance sheet.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Immunome (IMNM) Could Change Following Varegacestat’s ASCO 2026 Spotlight And NDA Timeline – Learn Why
feed.summary: Immunome, Inc. announced that data from its Phase 3 trial of varegacestat for desmoid tumors will be presented at ASCO 2026, with an NDA filing planned for Q2 2026. This news strengthens the investment narrative for Immunome, focusing on successful regulatory approval and commercialization. However, the company faces ongoing cash burn and the stock's fair value remains a point of wide disagreement among analysts.

feed.title: United Rentals (URI) Is Up 22.4% After Raising 2026 Revenue Guidance And Posting Record Q1 Results
feed.summary: United Rentals (URI) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with sales of US$3,419 million and total revenue of US$3,985 million, leading to a 22.4% stock price increase. The company raised its full-year 2026 revenue guidance to US$16.9 billion to US$17.4 billion and confirmed a quarterly dividend of US$1.97 per share, reflecting management's confidence amidst strong construction and infrastructure demand. Despite positive performance, the article highlights the importance of considering the impact of rising capital intensity and leverage on the business.

feed.title: Why Eaton Corporation plc Stock Is Sitting Near Highs Before a Big AI Power Test
feed.summary: Eaton Corporation plc's stock is trading near 52-week highs, driven by investor optimism surrounding its role in providing power management solutions for the booming AI and data center industries. The company is set to report its first-quarter earnings on May 5th, where investors will closely scrutinize orders, backlog, and margins to assess if AI demand is translating into actual revenue growth. Despite the strong demand, concerns remain about slower industrial activity and potential geopolitical issues, which could impact quarterly performance.

feed.title: Did Equinix’s (EQIX) SpinLaunch Deal and AI-Native Fabric Just Redefine Its Core Narrative?
feed.summary: Equinix's recent deal with SpinLaunch for satellite teleports and the launch of its AI-native Fabric Intelligence platform are positioning the company as a critical infrastructure provider for both Low Earth Orbit satellite connectivity and AI workloads. These developments reinforce Equinix's investment thesis as a global data center provider essential for AI and cloud, though the firm still faces challenges related to high capital needs and leverage for its "Build Bolder" expansion. The article suggests these moves further integrate AI into its core offerings and could deepen customer reliance on its network.

feed.title: Hero of the Seas Cruise Ship: Royal Caribbean’s Next-Generation Floating City Set to Redefine Caribbean Travel in 2027
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean is expanding its Icon Class fleet with the "Hero of the Seas" cruise ship, set to launch in 2027 from Miami. This next-generation vessel aims to redefine Caribbean travel by offering diverse amenities, immersive entertainment, various dining options, and an all-in-one vacation experience. Designed as a floating city, it will combine island exploration with resort-style living, appealing to a wide range of global travelers looking for convenience and value.

feed.title: Coterra Energy Inc. Delivers Strong FY 2025 Earnings Growth Driven by Commodity Strength and Strategic Acquisitions
feed.summary: Coterra Energy Inc. reported strong financial performance for FY 2025, with revenues reaching $7.65 billion (+40.1% YoY) and diluted EPS of $2.24 (+49.3% YoY), driven by higher commodity prices, increased production, and strategic acquisitions. The company's operating income grew by 76.5% to $2.45 billion, with significant contributions from oil and natural gas segments. Coterra is well-positioned for future growth, anticipating a pending merger with Devon Energy Corporation which is expected to create a larger, diversified U.S. E&P leader.

feed.title: Ultra Clean (NASDAQ: UCTT) extends $250M revolving credit line to 2031
feed.summary: Ultra Clean Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: UCTT) has extended its $250 million revolving credit line to April 23, 2031, through a Tenth Amendment to its existing credit agreement. This facility allows for senior secured credit in U.S. dollars and other currencies, including up to $50 million in letters of credit. The agreement specifies covenants such as a maximum Consolidated Secured Net Leverage Ratio of 3.25 to 1.00 (or 3.75 after a material acquisition) and a minimum Cash Interest Coverage Ratio of 3.00 to 1.00.

feed.title: Historical GGN stock prices (quote) - GAMCO Global Gold, Natural Resources & Income Trust
feed.summary: This article provides historical stock prices for GAMCO Global Gold, Natural Resources & Income Trust (GGN), including daily open, high, low, close, and volume data. It also explains how to use historical prices for trend analysis, risk assessment, and the impact of stock splits. The fund invests internationally in gold and natural resources sectors.

feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, disclosing a 14.5% beneficial ownership stake in Astec Industries (ASTE), totaling 3,321,688 shares. The filing indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 3,285,294 shares and sole dispositive power over all 3,321,688 shares. This passive investment disclosure also notes that iShares Core S&P Small-Cap ETF holds more than 5% of Astec Industries.

feed.title: The Best Gold ETF to Invest $500 in Right Now
feed.summary: This article recommends the SPDR Gold MiniShares Trust ETF (GLDM) as the best gold ETF for investors looking to allocate $500, primarily due to its lower expense ratio of 0.10% compared to its larger counterpart, SPDR Gold Shares ETF (GLD). It highlights continued potential for gold rallies driven by factors like central bank buying, U.S. federal debt, safe haven demand, and elevated inflation rates. The article advises investors to prioritize lower-cost options in commodity ETFs where the underlying asset is essentially the same.

feed.title: Key deals this week: Helix Energy, Tesla, QXO, USA Rare Earth and more (LLY:NYSE)
feed.summary: This article details significant deals across various sectors reported this week. Key announcements include Helix Energy Solutions and Hornbeck Offshore Services merging in an all-stock deal and a disclosure from Tesla.

feed.title: Toll Brothers Announces Model Homes Opening at Alora in Orlando, Florida
feed.summary: Toll Brothers has announced the grand opening of model homes at Alora, a new luxury townhome community in Orlando, Florida's Lake Nona area. The community offers modern three-story townhomes with customizable floor plans and access to resort-style amenities, priced from the upper $400,000s. Potential buyers are invited to tour the models during the Grand Opening event on Saturday, April 25.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks Stock Jumps as AI Cyber Fears Become Its Next Big Test
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) stock rose 3.08% as AI-powered cyber threats become a major concern for regulators and enterprises, particularly after Japan announced a cybersecurity task force following anxieties over Anthropic's Mythos AI model. The company is positioning itself to meet this demand by expanding its security platform and integrating recent acquisitions like CyberArk, despite ongoing challenges related to acquisition costs and integration. CEO Nikesh Arora believes the market's "paranoid reaction" to AI threats could create opportunities for discerning buyers.

feed.title: New mega-pipeline to open fuel floodgates for gas-starved California
feed.summary: California is set to receive a significant boost in fuel supply with the upcoming Western Gateway Pipeline project, a collaboration between Phillips 66 and Kinder Morgan. This pipeline, stretching from St. Louis to California, aims to alleviate the state's high gas prices and diminishing refining capacity by delivering 200,000 barrels per day. The project is expected to be completed by 2029 and has even garnered a favorable response from Governor Gavin Newsom's office, despite his previous environmental concerns.

feed.title: Will Dividend Hike and Leasing Strength Recast Kimco Realty's (KIM) Necessity Retail Narrative?
feed.summary: Kimco Realty (KIM) has demonstrated strong demand for its grocery-anchored shopping centers, reporting high occupancy and significant leasing activity, alongside a 4% dividend increase. While these factors reinforce near-term revenue potential and management confidence, investors should remain aware of the long-term impact of evolving shopping behaviors and online grocery penetration on its necessity-based retail model. The company projects substantial revenue and earnings growth by 2029, with a fair value estimate indicating a potential upside.

feed.title: Should Deere’s (DE) Expected Q2 Profit Drop Reshape How Investors View Its Precision Tech Story?
feed.summary: Deere & Company (DE) is expected to report a 12.5% decline in Q2 diluted EPS to US$5.81, raising questions about the company's precision agriculture and automation strategies. Despite this near-term setback, the long-term investment thesis relies on its technology and cost discipline to support margins. A recent "right to repair" settlement provides some clarity amidst investor scrutiny of how software and data-driven services will contribute to future margins.

feed.title: Wall Street analysts predict a 55.04% upside in Immunovant (IMVT): Here's what you should know
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts are forecasting a significant 55.04% upside for Immunovant (IMVT) based on recent ratings and price targets. This prediction suggests strong confidence in the biotechnology company's future performance. Investors and interested parties should consider the underlying analysis when evaluating IMVT.

feed.title: Highwoods Properties announces up to ~$300M equity distribution agreements
feed.summary: Highwoods Properties (NYSE:HIW) has announced that it entered into equity distribution agreements to sell up to $300 million of its common stock. The at-the-market offerings will be made through agents including Wells Fargo, BofA Securities, and J.P. Morgan. The company intends to use the net proceeds for general corporate purposes, including funding development, repaying debt, and potentially funding acquisitions.

feed.title: Medtronic announces key Affera clinical study milestones for Sphere-9 and Sphere-360 catheters as global adoption continues
feed.summary: Medtronic (NYSE: MDT) has announced significant advancements and ongoing clinical research for its Affera™ family of cardiac arrhythmia treatment technologies. Key milestones include promising data from the Sphere-9™ catheter for ventricular tachycardia (VT) treatment, which received Breakthrough Device Designation from the FDA, and consistent durability results for the Sphere-360™ catheter in atrial fibrillation (AFib) procedures. The company also initiated the Conquer-AF trial to further evaluate the Sphere-9 catheter for repeat AFib procedures, highlighting its commitment to expanding treatment options for cardiac arrhythmias.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz Stock Gets Fresh Dividend Cut Warning Ahead of May 6 Earnings
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz is facing renewed concerns about a potential dividend cut, with BofA Securities placing it in a higher-risk category and Morgan Stanley lowering its price target. The company's stock has fallen over 40% in three years due to various pressures, including cost inflation, competition, and the impact of GLP-1 drugs. With first-quarter earnings due May 6th and a gloomy 2026 outlook, investors are closely watching whether recent capital and marketing investments can reverse declining sales and protect its dividend.

feed.title: Taylor Morrison Revenue Reaches $1.3 Billion in Q1 2026
feed.summary: Taylor Morrison Home Corporation reported $1.3 billion in revenue for Q1 2026, delivering 2,268 homes at an average price of $578,000 despite high mortgage rates. The company highlighted increased demand for build-to-order homes, growing its backlog by 23%, and reaffirmed its full-year guidance of approximately 11,000 home closings. This performance reflects disciplined execution and strategic capital allocation, including $150 million in share repurchases.

feed.title: Assessing Harmonic (HLIT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Strength And Broadband Growth Expectations
feed.summary: Harmonic (HLIT) has seen significant recent share price strength, with a 1-month return of 11% and a 3-month return of 3%. The company's Broadband segment notably increased revenue by 92% in Q3 2024, driving overall revenue growth of 54%. While a popular narrative suggests the stock is 12.7% undervalued with a fair value of $12.10, Simply Wall St's DCF model indicates a much higher fair value of $28.96, implying the stock is heavily undervalued based on future cash flows.

feed.title: IRON Investor News: If You Have Suffered Losses in Disc Medicine, Inc. (NASDAQ: IRON), You Are Encouraged to Contact The Rosen Law Firm About Your Rights
feed.summary: This article from Scott Coop advises investors who have suffered losses in Disc Medicine, Inc. (NASDAQ: IRON) to contact The Rosen Law Firm regarding their rights. It appears to be an investor alert, likely related to potential legal action or a class-action lawsuit.

feed.title: Realty Income Stock Just Stumbled Before Earnings. The Dividend Test Comes Next
feed.summary: Realty Income (NYSE:O) stock fell 1.17% to $63.33 ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings report due May 6. The company recently declared its 670th monthly dividend of $0.2705 per share, and investors are focused on whether its cash flow can sustain both dividends and growth targets amidst rising borrowing costs. Analysts have a mixed outlook, with an average "Hold" rating and a 12-month price target of $66.61, highlighting risks from inflation and interest rates.

feed.title: A trillion reasons to watch MarketAxess in emerging markets
feed.summary: This article focuses on why MarketAxess is a company to watch in emerging markets, indicating significant growth or opportunity within this sector. The "trillion reasons" likely refers to vast potential financial gains or market size.

feed.title: Fair Isaac stock drops after US agencies announce alternative credit scores can be used in mortgage decisions
feed.summary: Fair Isaac's stock declined after U.S. housing agencies, Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac, announced they would accept new credit scoring models for mortgage decisions. This change broadens the criteria for assessing creditworthiness beyond traditional FICO scores, potentially increasing homeownership opportunities for those with limited credit history. The move could introduce more competition in the credit scoring market, impacting Fair Isaac, the developer of FICO scores.

feed.title: Newmont, Barrick still talking about NGM
feed.summary: Newmont Corp. and Barrick Mining Corp. are continuing discussions about their Nevada Gold Mines joint venture, following Newmont's notice of default against Barrick concerning alleged mismanagement. Despite the ongoing dispute, Newmont reported strong first-quarter earnings with significant adjusted net income and free cash flow and maintained its annual gold production guidance. The company is evaluating a potential acquisition of Barrick's Fourmile project to integrate it into NGM.

feed.title: Has International Paper (IP) Fallen Too Far After Recent 28% Share Price Slide?
feed.summary: International Paper (IP) has experienced a significant 28% stock price decline over the past year. Despite this, a Discounted Cash Flow analysis suggests the stock is currently undervalued by approximately 71.8%, with an estimated intrinsic value of US$115.77 compared to its recent price of US$32.65. The company's Price-to-Sales ratio of 0.73x also indicates it is trading at a discount compared to Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio of 1.83x, suggesting potential value for investors.

feed.title: Is Enphase Energy’s (ENPH) Evergen Deal Quietly Rewriting Its Software-Driven Storage Narrative?
feed.summary: Enphase Energy's recent integration of its IQ Batteries with Evergen in Australia and New Zealand is expanding its software-driven value proposition within the grid-services ecosystem. This move aims to make solar-plus-storage more appealing to homeowners through virtual power plant participation and energy optimization, supported by incentives. While this strengthens Enphase's investment narrative by highlighting software's role in system value, the company still faces challenges from a weak residential cycle and inventory overhang in the near term.

feed.title: Enterprise Products Partners Stock Heads Into a Big Week as Dividend Clock Ticks
feed.summary: Enterprise Products Partners (NYSE: EPD) is entering a significant week as investors anticipate its first-quarter earnings release and an upcoming dividend payment. The company, known for its midstream energy operations and consistent distributions, faces scrutiny on its income narrative amidst forecasts for increased natural gas liquids and natural gas output, alongside potential risks from stagnant oil prices. Analysts rate EPD a "Moderate Buy" with a modest target price, suggesting that earnings or management commentary will be key to any significant stock movement.

feed.title: A Look At Dynex Capital (DX) Valuation After Q1 Loss And 18% Capital Base Growth
feed.summary: Dynex Capital (DX) reported a net loss of US$80.36 million in Q1 2026, alongside an 18% capital base growth and a new US$300 million share buyback authorization. While its P/E ratio of 12.3x appears reasonable compared to the broader US market, it looks expensive against the Mortgage REITs industry and its peer group. The Discounted Cash Flow model, however, suggests the stock is significantly overvalued at its current price.

feed.title: (EQX) Technical Pivots with Risk Controls (EQX:CA)
feed.summary: This article provides technical trading pivots with risk controls for Equinox Gold Corp. (EQX:CA). It includes long-term trading plans, AI-generated signal ratings, and a list of recent related articles. The analysis suggests weak near-term ratings but strong mid and long-term ratings.

feed.title: Innovative Industrial Properties (IIPR) outperforms broader market: What you need to know
feed.summary: Innovative Industrial Properties (IIPR) closed at $104.99 in the latest trading session, marking a 0.28% rise. This performance outpaced the S&P 500's daily gain of 0.09% and the REIT and Equity Trust industry's 0.2% increase, indicating the company's strong relative market position. Investors will be looking for positive signs ahead of IIPR's upcoming earnings report.
